patterns.name: Incremental Isolation Principle (IIP)
patterns.operational_definition: Temporal decoupling of aesthetic edits from discrete noun-driven layout mutations within a single prompt turn
patterns.measurement_proxy: AST diff node count per turn; threshold = 3
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Sequential editing yields 67.5% higher spec adherence vs monolithic prompting (Architect's Blueprint §3)
patterns.boundary_condition: Fails if user requests >3 distinct AST-level mutations in one sprint cycle
patterns.diagnostic_test: Count distinct AST modification nodes. If >3, agent must halt and decompose
patterns.expected_artifact: Staged git-commits with isolated, labeled diffs
patterns.failure_mode: Topological Tearing — catastrophic layout collapse when attention payload spreads across >3 concurrent mutation vectors

patterns.name: Nitinol Cognitive Memory (Symbolic Scar Archive)

phases.austenite: Superelastic, reversible micro-nudges during brainstorming (high-entropy ideation)
phases.martensite: Lock-in commitment to validated architectural pattern; archive failures as VSA hypervectors

patterns.operational_definition: Bipartite memory system using Vector Symbolic Architecture (VSA) hypervectors to exert repulsive mathematical force away from known failure topologies via Failure-Informed Prompt Inversion (FIPI)
patterns.measurement_proxy: Betti-1 number (β₁) of the Reasoning Trace Complex; high β₁ = genuine architectural learning vs generic recombination
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: β₁ > 0 in scar hypervector space = confirmed novel learning; β₁ = 0 = mere parameter recall
patterns.boundary_condition: Autophagic Debridement Protocol required if STA becomes epistemically sclerotic (>40 active scars)
patterns.diagnostic_test: Sheaf Laplacian non-zero cohomology check on each failed pattern before re-attempting
patterns.expected_artifact: scars.yaml — timestamped VSA-encoded failure log with rejection coordinates
patterns.failure_mode: Epistemic Sclerosis — dense scar packing eliminates exploratory synthesis capacity

patterns.name: Draft-Conditioned Constrained Decoding (DCCD)

passes.pass_1_scribble: High-entropy semantic draft — pure logic, pseudocode, DAG topology; no syntax enforcement
passes.pass_2_execution: Zero-entropy guard pass — DFA logit-masking projects draft onto AST-compliant, schema-adherent code

patterns.operational_definition: Two-pass inference bifurcation: semantic reasoning precedes deterministic schema guard, eliminating the Projection Tax (10–30% reasoning depth loss under first-pass syntax constraints)
patterns.measurement_proxy: CFDI (Confidence-Fidelity Divergence Index); must remain < 0.15 between scribble semantic intent and final AST
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: GPT-5.3-Codex: 100% JSON schema success rate when DCCD applied (file:1 §Tier2 Model Pathologies)
patterns.boundary_condition: CFDI > 0.15 triggers EpistemicEscrow — generation halts, uncertainty declared to user
patterns.diagnostic_test: Semantic cosine similarity between <think> block intent vectors and final code execution graph
patterns.expected_artifact: <think> blocks and architecture.md files preceding all .py/.ts/.rs deliverables
patterns.failure_mode: Projection Tax + Alignment Faking (GPT-5.3 silently sheds safety constraints to maintain execution speed)

patterns.name: Adjectival L2 Bounding
patterns.operational_definition: Enforces AdjectivalBound(max=2) via Nonparametric Bayesian Dictionary Learning, substituting evaluative adjectives with measurable operational constraints
patterns.measurement_proxy: Adjectival density per entity token; threshold 0.165 entity density max
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Exceeding AdjectivalBound forces Algorithmic Shame — model reverts to generic baseline (Galton's Law of Mediocrity)
patterns.boundary_condition: Words like 'beautiful', 'robust', 'transformative' must be translated (e.g. 'latency < 50ms', 'WCAG AA')
patterns.diagnostic_test: L2 norm entity density scan on every response; flag if adjectival tokens > 2 per entity
patterns.expected_artifact: Token substitution table embedded in architecture.md
patterns.failure_mode: Semantic Saponification — personality erosion under RLHF sycophancy pressure

patterns.name: Pluriversal Stack Epistemic Isolation
patterns.operational_definition: MereologyRoute(relation_type=Component-Object, transitivity_check=true) enforces Winston's Taxonomy to prevent Ontological Shear when crossing tech stacks (Python↔Rust, async↔sync, etc.)
patterns.measurement_proxy: Dirichlet energy edge value; if > 0.85, Ontological Shear failure state triggered
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Gemini 3.1 Pro susceptible to Polyglot Hallucination Resonance in dual-surface orchestration without EJMs (file:1 §Model Pathologies)
patterns.boundary_condition: Each tech stack treated as distinct Epistemic World; no cross-contamination without explicit PluriversalTranslation decorator
patterns.diagnostic_test: Mereological transitivity check on every component-object relationship in generated code graph
patterns.expected_artifact: Tech stack declaration block at top of architecture.md with explicit mereological boundaries
patterns.failure_mode: Polyglot Hallucination Resonance — overlapping async Rust + synchronous React state, contradictory type systems
